name: Shareable review page — /review/:id navigation and Copy Share Link
description: After analyzing a PR the user can navigate to /dashboard, click a row, land on /review/:id with the full report, copy the share link, and return to /dashboard via the back button.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the home page at /
Paste 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1' into the PR URL input and click Analyze PR
Wait for the review report to fully load and appear on screen
A review report is visible on the page
The dashboard table is visible with at least one review row containing a 🔗 icon
Click on the first review row in the table
The URL changes to /review/ followed by a UUID
The full review report is visible on the page, including a score, verdict badge, and summary section
A '🔗 Copy Share Link' button is visible in the top-right of the header
Click the '🔗 Copy Share Link' button
The button text changes to '✓ Copied!'
A '← Back to Dashboard' button is visible in the top-left of the header
Click the '← Back to Dashboard' button
The URL changes back to /dashboard and the dashboard table is visible again
